parameters.query:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW "Agronegociar_Analytics".vw_ofertas_interessados AS
SELECT 
    br.id AS release_id,
    br.bid_id AS anuncio_id,
    br.created AS data_interesse,
    br.came_by AS canal_origem,
    p.name AS produto_nome,
    NULLIF(b.price::text, '')::numeric AS preco_anunciado,
    up.name AS nome_interessado,
    u.email AS email_interessado,
    (SELECT string_agg(ph.number, ' | ') 
     FROM "cbc".profile_phones pp 
     JOIN "cbc".phones ph ON pp.phone_id = ph.id 
     WHERE pp.profile_id = up.id) AS telefones_interessado
FROM "cbc".bid_releases br
LEFT JOIN "cbc".bids b ON br.bid_id = b.id
LEFT JOIN "types".products p ON b.product_id = p.id
LEFT JOIN "cbc".users u ON br.user_id = u.id 
LEFT JOIN "cbc".user_profiles up ON up.user_id = u.id
-- Filtro direto pelo e-mail:
WHERE u.email NOT IN ('junioreternum@hotmail.com', 'junioreternum@gmail.comxxx', 'lucas@getmia.com.br') 
   OR u.email IS NULL;

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW "Agronegociar_Analytics".vw_dashboard_indicadores AS 
SELECT 
    up.id AS profile_id,
    up.name,
    u.email,
    bp.company_name AS nome_empresa, 
    u.cell_phone_verified,
    u.created AS data_cadastro,
    u.last_access,
    u.deleted AS data_exclusao_usuario, 
    (SELECT string_agg(ph.number::text, ' | '::text) 
     FROM cbc.profile_phones pp
     JOIN cbc.phones ph ON pp.phone_id = ph.id 
     WHERE pp.profile_id = up.id) AS telefones
FROM cbc.user_profiles up
LEFT JOIN cbc.users u ON up.user_id = u.id
LEFT JOIN cbc.business_profiles bp ON bp.business_id = u.business_id 
WHERE u.email NOT IN ('junioreternum@hotmail.com', 'junioreternum@gmail.comxxx', 'junioreternum@gmail.comxxx','lucas@getmia.com.br', 'lucas95_souza@hotmail.com','dev_test_1@getmia.com.br
dev_test_2@getmia.com.br','dev_test_3@getmia.com.br','nicoleandradedesouza@hotmail.com', 'guilherme.turra@gmail.com', 'guiturra@yahoo.com.br')

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW "Agronegociar_Analytics".vw_bids_consolidado AS
SELECT 
    b.id AS bid_id,
    b.creator_id,
    b.status_id AS bid_status,
    b.created AS data_bid,
    b.deleted AS data_exclusao,
    p.name AS produto_nome,
    p.description AS produto_descricao_geral,
    b.quantity AS quantidade,
    qput.pt AS quantity_unit,
    b.price AS preco,
    ct.name AS city_name,
    st.uf AS state_name,
    CASE 
        WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM cbc.deals d WHERE d.bid_id = b.id)
          OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM cbc.bid_releases br WHERE br.bid_id = b.id AND br.came_by IS NOT NULL AND br.came_by <> '')
        THEN 'Com Engajamento'
        ELSE 'Sem Engajamento'
    END AS status_engajamento,
    up.name AS nome_criador,
    u.email AS email_criador,
    (SELECT string_agg(ph.number::text, ' | '::text) 
     FROM cbc.profile_phones pp
     JOIN cbc.phones ph ON pp.phone_id = ph.id 
     WHERE pp.profile_id = up.id) AS telefones_criador
FROM cbc.bids b
LEFT JOIN types.products p ON b.product_id = p.id
LEFT JOIN cbc.users u ON b.creator_id = u.id
LEFT JOIN cbc.user_profiles up ON up.user_id = u.id
LEFT JOIN types.cities ct ON b.pick_up_id = ct.id
LEFT JOIN types.states st ON ct.state_id = st.id
LEFT JOIN types.product_price_units qpu ON qpu.id = b.quantity_unit_id
LEFT JOIN types.product_price_unit_translations qput ON qput.id = qpu.translations_id
WHERE (u.email NOT IN (
    'junioreternum@hotmail.com', 
    'junioreternum@gmail.comxxx', 
    'lucas@getmia.com.br', 
    'lucas95_souza@hotmail.com',
    'dev_test_1@getmia.com.br',
    'dev_test_2@getmia.com.br',
    'dev_test_3@getmia.com.br',
    'nicoleandradedesouza@hotmail.com', 
    'guilherme.turra@gmail.com', 
    'guiturra@yahoo.com.br'
) OR u.email IS NULL);

parameters.jsCode: return { view: 'vw_bids_consolidado' };
return { view: 'vw_ofertas_interessados' };
return { view: 'vw_dashboard_indicadores' };

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW "Agronegociar_Analytics".vw_ofertas_interessados AS
SELECT 
    br.id AS release_id,
    br.bid_id AS anuncio_id,
    br.created AS data_interesse,
    br.came_by AS canal_origem,
    p.name AS produto_nome,
    NULLIF(b.price::text, '')::numeric AS preco_anunciado,
    up.name AS nome_interessado,
    u.email AS email_interessado,
    (SELECT string_agg(ph.number, ' | ') 
     FROM "cbc".profile_phones pp 
     JOIN "cbc".phones ph ON pp.phone_id = ph.id 
     WHERE pp.profile_id = up.id) AS telefones_interessado
FROM "cbc".bid_releases br
LEFT JOIN "cbc".bids b ON br.bid_id = b.id
LEFT JOIN "types".products p ON b.product_id = p.id
LEFT JOIN "cbc".users u ON br.user_id = u.id 
LEFT JOIN "cbc".user_profiles up ON up.user_id = u.id
-- Filtro direto pelo e-mail:
WHERE u.email NOT IN ('junioreternum@hotmail.com', 'junioreternum@gmail.comxxx', 'junioreternum@gmail.comxxx','lucas@getmia.com.br', 'lucas95_souza@hotmail.com','dev_test_1@getmia.com.br',
'dev_test_2@getmia.com.br','dev_test_3@getmia.com.br','nicoleandradedesouza@hotmail.com', 'guilherme.turra@gmail.com', 'guiturra@yahoo.com.br')
   OR u.email IS NULL;

DROP VIEW IF EXISTS "Agronegociar_Analytics".vw_dashboard_indicadores;
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW "Agronegociar_Analytics".vw_dashboard_indicadores AS 
SELECT 
    up.id AS profile_id,
    up.name,
    u.email,
    u.cell_phone_verified,
    u.created AS data_cadastro,
    u.last_access,
    u.deleted AS data_exclusao_usuario, -- Adicionada a coluna deleted da tabela users
    (SELECT string_agg(ph.number::text, ' | '::text) 
     FROM cbc.profile_phones pp
     JOIN cbc.phones ph ON pp.phone_id = ph.id 
     WHERE pp.profile_id = up.id) AS telefones
FROM cbc.user_profiles up
LEFT JOIN cbc.users u ON up.user_id = u.id
WHERE u.email NOT IN ('junioreternum@hotmail.com', 'junioreternum@gmail.comxxx', 'junioreternum@gmail.comxxx','lucas@getmia.com.br', 'lucas95_souza@hotmail.com','dev_test_1@getmia.com.br',
'dev_test_2@getmia.com.br','dev_test_3@getmia.com.br','nicoleandradedesouza@hotmail.com', 'guilherme.turra@gmail.com', 'guiturra@yahoo.com.br')
   OR u.email IS NULL;

DROP VIEW IF EXISTS "Agronegociar_Analytics".vw_bids_consolidado;
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW "Agronegociar_Analytics".vw_bids_consolidado AS 
SELECT 
    b.id AS bid_id,
    b.creator_id,
    b.status_id AS bid_status,
    b.created AS data_bid,
    b.deleted AS data_exclusao, -- Adicionada a coluna deleted
    p.name AS produto_nome,
    p.description AS produto_descricao_geral, -- Ajustado para bater com seu dash
    b.quantity AS quantidade,
    b.price AS preco,
    
    -- LÓGICA DE ENGAJAMENTO (Substituindo o DAX)
    CASE 
        WHEN EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM "cbc".deals d 
            WHERE d.bid_id = b.id
        ) OR EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM "cbc".bid_releases br 
            WHERE br.bid_id = b.id AND br.came_by IS NOT NULL AND br.came_by <> ''
        ) THEN 'Com Engajamento'
        ELSE 'Sem Engajamento'
    END AS status_engajamento,

    up.name AS nome_criador,
    u.email AS email_criador,
    (SELECT string_agg(ph.number::text, ' | '::text) 
     FROM cbc.profile_phones pp
     JOIN cbc.phones ph ON pp.phone_id = ph.id 
     WHERE pp.profile_id = up.id) AS telefones_criador

FROM cbc.bids b
LEFT JOIN types.products p ON b.product_id = p.id
LEFT JOIN cbc.user_profiles up ON b.creator_id = up.id
LEFT JOIN cbc.users u ON up.user_id = u.id
WHERE u.email NOT IN ('junioreternum@hotmail.com', 'junioreternum@gmail.comxxx', 'junioreternum@gmail.comxxx','lucas@getmia.com.br', 'lucas95_souza@hotmail.com','dev_test_1@getmia.com.br',
'dev_test_2@getmia.com.br','dev_test_3@getmia.com.br','nicoleandradedesouza@hotmail.com', 'guilherme.turra@gmail.com', 'guiturra@yahoo.com.br')
   OR u.email IS NULL;

parameters.jsCode: return { view: 'vw_bids_consolidado' };
return { view: 'vw_ofertas_interessados' };
return { view: 'vw_dashboard_indicadores' };
